mapper.sql: SELECT u.email AS freelancer_email, u.name, u.job_category, u.profile_file_id, p.short_intro, p.description, p.view_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bookmark b WHERE b.company_email = #{companyEmail} AND b.freelancer_email = u.email ) AS is_favorite, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio pf WHERE pf.email = u.email AND pf.is_public = 1 AND pf.is_deleted = 0 ) AS public_project_count FROM user u INNER JOIN portfolio_profile p ON p.freelancer_email = u.email AND p.is_portfolio_public = 1

sql.if: AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR p.short_intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM portfolio_profile_tech_stack ts WHERE ts.freelancer_email = u.email AND ts.tech_stack LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') ) )

mapper.select:
WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY
u.name ASC, u.email ASC
p.view_count DESC, u.name ASC, u.email ASC
LIMIT #{condition.safeSize} OFFSET #{condition.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user u INNER JOIN portfolio_profile p ON p.freelancer_email = u.email AND p.is_portfolio_public = 1 WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_profile SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail} AND is_portfolio_public = 1
